title: Night Vision
description: Apply Infinite Night Vision effect via command.
body:
Based on: [Night Vision Plugin](https://modrinth.com/plugin/nightvision-plugin) by [Winlyps](https://modrinth.com/user/Winlyps)
- ~~Applies infinitive Night Vision effect everytime you join the server.~~
  
Disabled applying effecct upon joining server. Can only be applied via command now.

- Applies infinitive Night Vision via /gamma command. Can be toggled on/off. 
  
  No permissions needed.

- Fixed enable & disable messages being reversed/opposite.

- Removed all potion & particle effects. Only visible in inventory now.

Checkout my other plugins: [CLICK HERE](https://modrinth.com/user/never2nv/plugins)

Checkout Winlyps other plugins: [CLICK HERE](https://modrinth.com/user/Winlyps/plugins)
